general.title: General Settings
general.description: Manage your library and file preferences.

sync_metadata.title: Sync Metadata to Files
sync_metadata.description: Automatically update original EPUB files with your changes.
sync_metadata.warning: Currently only EPUB files are supported.

koreader.title: KOReader Synchronization
koreader.subtitle: Manage your KOReader sync tokens and connection details.

connection.title: Connection Details
connection.sync_server_hint: Enter this in KOReader Settings → Progress Sync → Custom sync server.
connection.webdav_hint: Enter this in KOReader Menu → Tools → Reading statistics → Settings → Cloud sync.

tokens.title: Sync Tokens
tokens.empty_message: Create a token for each KOReader device or integration you want to connect.
tokens.new_token_message: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
tokens.description_hint: Name the device or integration this token belongs to.

toasts.created: Created a new KOReader sync token.

instructions.title: How to set up KOReader Sync
instructions.step_1: Generate a Sync Token above for your device.
instructions.step_2: In KOReader, go to Settings → Progress Sync → Custom sync server and enter the Sync Server URL.
instructions.step_3: Select Register / Login and use your Shelf username and the Sync Token as the password.
instructions.step_4: For Reading Statistics, go to Menu → Tools → Reading statistics → Settings → Cloud sync.
instructions.step_5: Add a WebDAV service with the WebDAV URL, your username, and the same Sync Token.
